case_title: RONAS, RICARDO P. VS PRADO, JORGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY RONAS, RICARDO P. AS TO DEFENDANT PRADO, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONAS, RICARDO P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRADO, JORGE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00, IF DEFENDANT RETURNS THE BOAT TO PLAINTIFF AND RESTORE TITLE TO HIM WITHIN 30 DAYS -JUDGMENT SHALL BE SATISFIED IN FULL WITHOUT MONETARY PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
